product_overview: RiskNode is a lightweight trading utility that calculates position sizing and target profit, saves trades to a local journal, and provides an AI "roast" evaluating unrealistic risk/reward behavior. The app runs in-browser with client-side persistence and an AI evaluation endpoint.
core_goals: Provide real-time risk, position size, and target profit calculations from user inputs on the calculator page (/).
Allow users to commit trades to a local journal, view and manage those trades on /journal, and persist entries in browser LocalStorage.
Offer an AI-driven evaluation (roast) of saved trades via a POST /api/roast call to flag unrealistic discipline or targets.
Enforce input validation and guardrails (max risk, logical price relationships, positive capital) to prevent invalid saves.
Keep the UI simple and offline-capable while documenting localStorage persistence limitations.

features.name: Risk Calculation
features.description: Calculate position size and target profit in real time from Capital, Risk %, Entry, Stop Loss, and Target Ratio inputs on the calculator page (/).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill Capital input (input-capital) with 10000 -> Fill Risk % input (input-risk) with 1 -> Fill Entry Price input (input-entry) with 100 -> Fill Stop Loss input (input-stoploss) with 90 -> Modify Target Ratio (input-ratio) to 4 -> See Target Profit update to 400
Navigate to / -> Fill Risk % input (input-risk) with 5.5 -> See validation error 'Risk cannot exceed 5%' -> See Save Button (btn-save) disabled
Navigate to / -> Fill Entry Price input (input-entry) with 50000 -> Fill Stop Loss input (input-stoploss) with 51000 -> See Position Size update to 0 -> See Save Button (btn-save) disabled
Navigate to / -> Fill Capital input (input-capital) with 0 -> See calculations bypassed or error state -> See Save Button (btn-save) disabled

features.name: Trade Journaling
features.description: Save completed trade entries from the calculator into a journal stored in LocalStorage, view and manage trades on /journal (mark won/lost, delete single or all entries).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill Asset Pair input (input-asset) with BTCUSD -> Fill Capital input (input-capital) -> Fill Risk % input (input-risk) -> Fill Entry Price input (input-entry) -> Fill Stop Loss input (input-stoploss) -> Modify Target Ratio (input-ratio) -> Click Save Button (btn-save) to commit trade -> Navigate to /journal -> See new trade row in Journal
Navigate to / -> Leave Asset Pair input (input-asset) empty -> Click Save Button (btn-save) to commit trade -> See validation error preventing save
Navigate to /journal -> Click Mark trade as Won (btn-won) on a trade row -> See that row status label and color update to Won
Navigate to /journal -> Click Delete Button (btn-delete) on a specific trade row -> See trade row removed from view -> Refresh browser -> See trade still absent (LocalStorage updated)

features.name: AI Risk Evaluator (Roast)
features.description: From the Journal page (/journal) trigger an AI roast via POST /api/roast to get feedback on trade discipline and unrealistic targets; results are displayed inline for the selected trade.
user_flows: Navigate to /journal -> Select a saved trade with Target Ratio (input-ratio) set to 15 -> Click Evaluate Button (btn-evaluate) on that trade -> Observe a POST /api/roast request made -> See AI response text displayed in UI containing phrase 'greedy dreamers'
Navigate to /journal -> Click Evaluate Button (btn-evaluate) when there are no saved trades -> See message 'No trades to evaluate' or Evaluate button disabled

Navigate to /journal -> Click Evaluate Button (btn-evaluate) on a trade -> Observe POST /api/roast returns network or server error -> See error message displayed 'Evaluation failed, try again' or similar

routes.description: Trading Journal where trades are displayed and AI roast is triggered

features.name: Risk Calculation
features.description: Calculate position size and target profit based on risk parameters

features.name: Trade Journaling
features.description: Save trades to local storage and manage them in a list
user_interactions: Click Save Button (btn-save) to commit trade

features.name: AI Risk Evaluator (Roast)
features.description: AI identifies bad trading discipline and roasts the user
user_interactions: Click Evaluate Button (btn-evaluate) to get AI feedback

known_limitations.issue: Data is stored in localStorage only
known_limitations.impact: Data does not persist across different browsers or devices
